factors.summary: The company has not provided specific forward guidance in the text.

evidence.text: This section discusses our results of operations for the year ended December 31, 2022 as compared to the year ended December 31, 2021. For a discussion and analysis of the year ended December 31, 2021, compared to the same period in 2020 please refer to Management’s Discussion and Analysis of Financial Condition and Results of Operations included in Part II, Item 7 of our Annual Report on Form 10-K for the year ended December 31, 2021, filed with the SEC on February 25, 2022.
evidence.subsection: Item 7.    Management’s Discussion and Analysis of Financial Condition and Results of Operations ("MD&A")

sentiment.label: neutral
sentiment.rationale: The company has not provided specific forward guidance, indicating no clear positive or negative outlook.
